requirement_topic.en: TISI / TIS Product-Standard Check and IEC 62109 Safety Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: TISI / TIS 产品标准核验与 IEC 62109 安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: TISI / TIS 產品標準核驗與 IEC 62109 安全證據

summary.en: Thailand market access should start with a TISI scope check for the exact inverter model and use case. Publicly available TISI materials do not support a blanket statement that every complete solar PV inverter is subject to a compulsory whole-unit TIS licence, so the conservative position is to verify the applicable Thai Industrial Standard route and prepare IEC 62109-1:2010 / IEC 62109-2:2011 safety evidence for buyer, utility, project-owner, or regulator review where requested.
summary.zh: 进入泰国市场应先按具体逆变器型号和用途进行 TISI 适用范围核验。公开 TISI 材料不足以支持“所有完整太阳能光伏逆变器均需强制整机 TIS 许可”的笼统结论，因此保守做法是核验适用的泰国工业标准路径，并在买方、公用事业、项目业主或监管方要求时准备 IEC 62109-1:2010 / IEC 62109-2:2011 安全证据。
summary.zht: 進入泰國市場應先按具體逆變器型號和用途進行 TISI 適用範圍核驗。公開 TISI 材料不足以支持「所有完整太陽能光伏逆變器均需強制整機 TIS 許可」的籠統結論，因此保守做法是核驗適用的泰國工業標準路徑，並在買方、公用事業、專案業主或監管方要求時準備 IEC 62109-1:2010 / IEC 62109-2:2011 安全證據。

standards_or_laws: Thai Industrial Standards Institute product-scope and TIS licence review

summary.en: China dossiers often include GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, IEC 62109 test reports, CQC or CGC certificates, and factory model-family data. These can support technical review but do not by themselves prove that the product is outside or inside a Thai TISI / TIS route.
summary.zh: 中国资料包通常包括 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、IEC 62109 测试报告、CQC 或 CGC 证书及工厂型号族资料。这些资料可支持技术审查，但本身不能证明产品在泰国 TISI / TIS 路径中属于适用或不适用。
summary.zht: 中國資料包通常包括 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、IEC 62109 測試報告、CQC 或 CGC 證書及工廠型號族資料。這些資料可支持技術審查，但本身不能證明產品在泰國 TISI / TIS 路徑中屬於適用或不適用。

gap.en: The gap is scope certainty and local acceptance, not just test coverage. Exporters should map model ratings, topology, isolation, firmware, labels, manuals, and report holder names to the Thai importer and project file before assuming an IEC 62109 report will be accepted.
gap.zh: 差距在于适用范围确定性和本地接受性，而不只是测试覆盖。出口商在假设 IEC 62109 报告可被接受前，应将型号额定值、拓扑、隔离方式、固件、标签、说明书和报告持有人名称对应到泰国进口商和项目文件。
gap.zht: 差距在於適用範圍確定性和本地接受性，而不只是測試覆蓋。出口商在假設 IEC 62109 報告可被接受前，應將型號額定值、拓撲、隔離方式、韌體、標籤、說明書和報告持有人名稱對應到泰國進口商和專案文件。

mandatory_status.target: Scope-dependent; do not claim compulsory whole-unit TISI approval for every PV inverter without a product-specific TISI instrument or Thai authority confirmation
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project/customer evidence unless tied to a Chinese certification, procurement, or grid-connection route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Start with a TISI scope check and keep IEC 62109 evidence ready, but do not describe IEC 62109 or a China certificate as automatic Thai product approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应先进行 TISI 适用范围核验并准备 IEC 62109 证据，但不应将 IEC 62109 或中国证书描述为自动取得泰国产品批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應先進行 TISI 適用範圍核驗並準備 IEC 62109 證據，但不應將 IEC 62109 或中國證書描述為自動取得泰國產品批准。
